name: Latkes - (Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the potatoes onto paper towels. Squeeze out the moisture.
2. Combine the potatoes and the remaining ingredients, except the plain lowfat yogurt and unsweetened applesauce. Beat well.
3. Heat the oil in a skillet. Drop the batter into the oil by spoonfuls.
4. Fry until crisp and brown on both sides. Remove from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
5. Serve warm with plain lowfat yogurt and unsweetened applesauce.
Note: One-fourth cup of oil is used in frying. Reserve the rest of the oil for later use by storing it in the refrigerator.
Serves 4
One Serving = 3 Pancakes (yogurt and applesauce not included)
Calories: 260
Carbohydrates: 27
Protein: 5
Fat: 15
Sodium: 23
Potassium: 449
Cholesterol: 66
Exchange Value: 2 Bread Exchanges + 3 Fat Exchanges (yogurt and applesauce not included)
